message:
chore: bump version to 0.4.1 for musl binary release

The v0.4.0 release shipped gnu-linked Linux binaries but the install
script expects musl targets, causing a 404 download failure and
fallback to compile-from-source. This version bump triggers a new
release that builds musl-linked static binaries matching the installer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
